targetFormat: .holo parser — domain-postfx, CAMERA keyword, @traits in domain blocks
observed: 9 out of 20 sampled example files fail to parse. Error patterns: (1) domain-postfx blocks use LBRACE instead of COLON, (2) CAMERA treated as keyword instead of object identifier, (3) @traits inside domain blocks trigger AT/identifier errors, (4) multi-agent pipeline uses comma-separated ports that the parser rejects.
